# RenewalEngineAI

> Done-for-you AI automation for independent insurance agencies. We build and run AI renewal campaigns, instant lead response, quote follow-up, and cross-sell automation inside agencies running on Applied Epic, HawkSoft, or EZLynx. Outcomes: 15-20% higher retention, sub-60-second lead response, 391% more lead conversions.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://renewalengineai.com/): Product overview, pricing, ROI calculator, FAQ.
- [How It Works](https://renewalengineai.com/how-it-works): The three-phase engagement — Audit, Build & Launch, Managed Ops.
- [For Independent Agencies](https://renewalengineai.com/for-independent-agencies): Audience landing page — who this is built for.

## Services

- [AI Renewal Audit](https://renewalengineai.com/#pricing): $1,500 five-day assessment.
- [AI Build & Launch](https://renewalengineai.com/#pricing): $6,000 two-to-three-week implementation.
- [Managed AI Operations](https://renewalengineai.com/#pricing): $2,500/month ongoing optimization.

## Courses

- [All Courses](https://renewalengineai.com/courses): Self-paced training catalog.
- [AI for Agent Retention](https://renewalengineai.com/courses/ai-for-agent-retention): $397 course on building a renewal automation system.
- [AI Agency Operations Bootcamp](https://renewalengineai.com/courses/ai-agency-ops-bootcamp): $797 course on running agency operations on AI.
- [Mastermind & Community](https://renewalengineai.com/mastermind): $97-197/month ongoing membership for agents running AI.
- [Team Licenses](https://renewalengineai.com/team-licenses): Multi-seat course access for 3-50 seat agencies.

## Pillar resources

- [The Insurance Renewal Automation Playbook](https://renewalengineai.com/resources/ai-renewal-automation-playbook): The four-touch cadence, personalization rules, and metrics that actually lift retention.
- [Instant Lead Response Under 60 Seconds](https://renewalengineai.com/resources/instant-lead-response-under-60-seconds): The workflow that rebuilds the top of an agency's funnel.
- [AMS + AI Integration Guide](https://renewalengineai.com/resources/ams-ai-integration-guide): Integration patterns for Applied Epic, HawkSoft, and EZLynx.

## Case studies (composite)

- [Pacific Agency Group — 350-policy personal lines on Applied Epic](https://renewalengineai.com/case-studies/pacific-agency-group-personal-lines): 82% → 94% retention, 47 hrs → 38 sec lead response, $187K recovered annual premium.
- [Ridgeline Commercial Insurance — 180 accounts on HawkSoft](https://renewalengineai.com/case-studies/ridgeline-commercial-insurance): 86% → 95% retention, $312K cross-sell opportunities surfaced, 2.3 → 4.1 policies per household.

## Comparisons

- [RenewalEngineAI vs. hiring a CSR](https://renewalengineai.com/compare/renewalengineai-vs-hiring-csr): Year-1 cost math of AI automation vs the $60-80K CSR hire.
- [RenewalEngineAI vs. Strada](https://renewalengineai.com/compare/renewalengineai-vs-strada): Done-for-you service vs self-serve software.
- [RenewalEngineAI vs. Sonant AI](https://renewalengineai.com/compare/renewalengineai-vs-sonant-ai): Voice-first AI vs multi-channel renewal automation.
